status_notes: Freely available at www.cryptrec.go.jp (note: the bare domain without 'www.' throws a TLS certificate mismatch — always use the www subdomain).
notes: Jointly run by the Digital Agency, the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications (MIC), and METI. Defines Japan's government-approved cryptographic algorithms.

match_nodes.description: CRYPTREC Ciphers List — Japan's government-approved cryptographic algorithms

data.notes: Three tiers: e-Government Recommended Ciphers List (31 classical specs + 6 post-quantum specs), Candidate Recommended Ciphers List (9 specs), Monitored Ciphers List (4 specs). Most recent revision March 30, 2026 (doc CRYPTREC LS-0001-2022R2); post-quantum cryptography algorithms now included. Foundational for crypto-agility and compliance assessments in cloud/IoT security.
